name: mukeshsarees
description: Mukesh Saree Centre - Premium Indian Ethnic Wear

scripts.build: vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs && tsx scripts/build_meta.js && tsx scripts/prerender.ts && tsx scripts/generate-sitemap.ts
scripts.build:prod: vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs && tsx scripts/build_meta.js && tsx scripts/prerender.ts && tsx scripts/generate-sitemap.ts
